hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "PLUGIN_ROOT is not set" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] || [ ! -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ]; then echo "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root" >&2; exit 1; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook SessionStart; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { Write-Error 'PLUGIN_ROOT is not set'; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { Write-Error "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root"; exit 1 }; if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook SessionStart }

hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "PLUGIN_ROOT is not set" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] || [ ! -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ]; then echo "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root" >&2; exit 1; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { Write-Error 'PLUGIN_ROOT is not set'; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { Write-Error "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root"; exit 1 }; if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $input | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit }

hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "PLUGIN_ROOT is not set" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] || [ ! -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ]; then echo "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root" >&2; exit 1; fi; tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; cat > "$tmp"; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" policy-gate --root . --hook < "$tmp"; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit 2; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" publish-gate --root . --hook < "$tmp"; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { Write-Error 'PLUGIN_ROOT is not set'; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { Write-Error "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root"; exit 1 }; if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $tmp = New-TemporaryFile; $input | Set-Content -Path $tmp; Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" policy-gate --root . --hook; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Remove-Item $tmp; exit 2 }; Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" publish-gate --root . --hook; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Remove-Item $tmp; exit 2 }; Remove-Item $tmp }

hooks.command: root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "PLUGIN_ROOT is not set" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] || [ ! -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ]; then echo "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root" >&2; exit 1; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" completion-gate --root . >&2; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit 2; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook Stop; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { Write-Error 'PLUGIN_ROOT is not set'; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { Write-Error "invalid PLUGIN_ROOT: $root"; exit 1 }; if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" completion-gate --root . 1>&2; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 2 }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook Stop }
